title: php security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[8.0.30-5]
- Fix Null byte termination in dns_get_record()
  GHSA-www2-q4fc-65wf
- Fix Heap buffer overflow in array_merge()
  CVE-2025-14178
- Fix Information Leak of Memory in getimagesize
  CVE-2025-14177
full_text:
[8.0.30-5]
- Fix Null byte termination in dns_get_record()
  GHSA-www2-q4fc-65wf
- Fix Heap buffer overflow in array_merge()
  CVE-2025-14178
- Fix Information Leak of Memory in getimagesize
  CVE-2025-14177

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2799.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-14177.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-14178.html
